output.sparql:
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?regionLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q4602457 p:P170 ?participant ; ps:P1480 "18.717" ; pq:P27 ?country .
  ?country wdt:P131 ?region .
  ?region wdt:P3647 wd:Q7736 .
  ?region wdt:P3647 wd:Q29971 .
  ?region rdfs:label ?regionLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?regionLabel) = "en")
}

  wd:Q4602457 p:P170 ?participant.
  ?participant ps:P170 ?team.
  ?participant ps:P1480 "18.717".
  ?team wdt:P17 ?country.
  ?country wdt:P3647 wd:Q7736.
  ?country wdt:P3647 wd:Q29971.
  ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel.
  FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = "en").
}
